title: citrus × limon
intro: Citrus × limon, commonly known as the lemon plant, is a hybrid of sour orange (Citrus × aurantium) and citron (Citrus medica), and is widely cultivated for its edible fruit and essential oil. The medicinal properties of lemon plant include its high vitamin C content, which acts as an antioxidant, and its antimicrobial properties, which help to combat infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of consuming lemon plant products include aiding digestion, boosting the immune system, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the lemon plant include lemon juice, lemon essential oil, and lemon-based teas, which can be used to make medicinal remedies, flavor food and drinks, and provide aromatherapy benefits.
